name: createAccount
title: Create Account
description: Create a new Convex account with the specified public key. Optionally request faucet coins (in copper). Requires a peer willing to accept faucet requests.

accountKey.description: Hex encoded public key (account key) for the new account, with or without 0x prefix

faucet.description: Optional amount of convex coins to request from faucet (in copper). If not provided, no faucet request is made.

address.description: The address of the newly created account

errorCode.description: CVM error code if the account creation failed
